Variables.Name: Range
Variables.Description:
The radial range of the attraction around the source particle.
	 	Particle-life relative.

Variables.Name: bStrengthByDistance
Variables.Description: The strength curve is a function of distance or of time.

Variables.Name: Strength
Variables.Description:
The strength of the attraction (negative values repel).
	 	Particle-life relative if StrengthByDistance is false.

Variables.Name: bAffectBaseVelocity
Variables.Description: If true, the velocity adjustment will be applied to the base velocity.

Variables.Name: SelectionMethod
Variables.Description:
The method to use when selecting an attractor target particle from the emitter.
	 	One of the following:
	 	Random		- Randomly select a particle from the source emitter.  
	 	Sequential  - Select a particle using a sequential order.

Variables.Name: bRenewSource
Variables.Description: Whether the particle should grab a new particle if it's source expires.

Variables.Name: bInheritSourceVel
Variables.Description: Whether the particle should inherit the source veloctiy if it expires.
